scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix web -- --port 5174 --strictPort --host"
scripts.heroku-postbuild: if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo 'Building MARKETING site'; cd AEP_website/landing && npm ci --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../.. && cp -r AEP_website/landing/config config && cp -r AEP_website/landing/dist dist && echo 'Done building marketing site'; else echo 'Building WEB+SERVER'; cd web && npm ci --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../server && npm ci --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cd ..; fi
